dataset.description: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).

columns.description: Full name of the batter player (unique identifier)
columns.name: player_name

columns.description: Player's designated role (fixed as 'Batter')
columns.name: role

columns.description: Lifetime cumulative runs scored in all matches
columns.name: total_runs

columns.description: Batting efficiency measured as runs per 100 balls faced
columns.name: strike_rate

columns.description: Total balls confronted by the batter in their career
columns.name: total_balls_faced

columns.description: Wickets taken when occasionally bowling (likely minimal)
columns.name: total_wickets_taken

columns.description: Runs given away when bowling (secondary skill metrics)
columns.name: total_runs_conceded

columns.description: Overs delivered as a part-time bowler
columns.name: total_overs_bowled

columns.description: Career total matches participated in
columns.name: total_matches_played

columns.description: Matches where player fulfilled batting role (identical to total_matches_played)
columns.name: matches_played_as_batter

columns.description: Matches as bowler (always 0 for batters)

columns.description: Number of matches won by player's team during their participation

columns.description: Number of matches lost by player's team during their participation

columns.description: Count of Man of the Match awards received

columns.description: National team represented by the player

columns.description: Batting average (total runs divided by dismissals)
columns.name: average

desc: The dataset contains four tables: batter_player_stats (batting statistics for individual players), bowler_player_stats (bowling statistics for individual players), detailed_player_data (per-match player performance data), and match_summary (match-level details including toss results, match outcome, player of the match, and venue information).
goal: Analyze which individual player performances contribute most to match victories, focusing on the best players' batting and bowling statistics and their impact on the match outcome.
name: Visual Analytics System cricket_goal3_1742657908

effect.description: Brushing on any axis filters players meeting selected metric thresholds

visualization.description: Parallel coordinates plot showing computed performance impact scores across normalized metrics. Lines colored by matches won percentage with opacity encoding award frequency
encodings: x: quantitative axes for normalized batting/bowling metrics
y: parallel axes showing performance impact scores

effect.description: Select individual players to highlight venue patterns

visualization.description: Scatter plot matrix with runs vs wickets in main view, colored by match outcome. Size encodes strike rate, faceted rows show economy rate brackets
Faceted bar charts split by match outcome, showing top 20 players by fantasy points. Color highlights PoM awards
Geospatial heatmap with hexagonal bins showing venue performance patterns. Color shows average runs scored, size shows wickets taken for home-team wins
Multi-panel density plots showing distribution of player averages, linked to team success through color encoding

data.reason: Original tasks referenced undefined impact scores - needs explicit calculation basis
data.requirement: Add performance impact score formula: Batters: (total_runs * strike_rate)/100, Bowlers: (total_wickets * (6 - economy_rate))

data.reason: The error occurred due to ambiguity in the `player_name` column across tables. Each table should have a unique column name or an alias to avoid this issue.
data.requirement: Ensure that each table has unique column names across tables to avoid ambiguity

visualization.reason: Supports replacement of parallel coordinates with comparable multivariate analysis
visualization.requirement: Add small multiples visualization requirement for metric comparison

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW w_p_performance AS SELECT player_name, total_runs, strike_rate, total_wickets_taken, economy_rate, matches_won FROM batter_player_stats JOIN bowler_player_stats ON batter_player_stats.player_name = bowler_player_stats.player_name;
sqls.name: w_p_performance

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW d_match_data AS SELECT match_id, player, team, runs, balls_faced, fours, sixes, wickets, overs_bowled, balls_bowled, runs_conceded, catches, run_outs, maiden, stumps, match_outcome, economy_rate, fantasy_points FROM detailed_player_data;
sqls.name: d_match_data

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW m_match_summary AS SELECT match_id, created, city, dates, event_name, match_number, toss_winner, toss_decision, outcome_winner, outcome_by_runs, outcome_by_wickets, player_of_match, season, teams, venue, total_fours, total_sixes FROM match_summary;
sqls.name: m_match_summary

sqls.SQL: CREATE VIEW p_m_performance AS SELECT d_match_data.player, m_match_summary.match_number, d_match_data.runs, d_match_data.wickets, d_match_data.strike_rate, d_match_data.economy_rate, d_match_data.fantasy_points, outcome_winner, d_match_data.match_outcome FROM d_match_data JOIN m_match_summary ON d_match_data.match_id = m_match_summary.match_id;
sqls.name: p_m_performance

tasks.method: Scatter plot matrix with trend lines combining match outcome and metrics, using SQL JOIN on match_id between detailed_player_data and match_summary. Highlight players from winning teams using color encoding.
tasks.objective: Identify direct relationships between individual batting/bowling metrics and match victories

tasks.method: Parallel coordinates plot showing computed performance impact scores (D2 formula), with axes for normalized metrics and award frequency. Interactive brushing to filter top performers.
tasks.objective: Compare relative importance of different metrics in determining match-winning contributions

tasks.method: Faceted bar charts (V1) split by batter/bowler roles. Use length encoding for metrics and color for match outcome. Sort bars by fantasy_points descending.
tasks.objective: Identify players with consistently high fantasy points in winning matches

tasks.method: Geospatial heatmap (V4) layered with hexagonal binning. Geographic positions encoded via city, intensity shows avg runs/wickets for home-team winners.
tasks.objective: Reveal venue-specific performance patterns contributing to victories

tasks.method: Interactive radar chart with weight sliders (I2). Radial axes represent D2 metrics. Clusters identified via k-means based on slider-adjusted weights.
tasks.objective: Discover player archetypes with distinct match-winning contribution patterns

tasks.method: Multi-panel kernel density estimation plots. Progression from career averages to match-specific wins shown through linked selections.
tasks.objective: Analyze how batting/bowling consistency correlates with team success

tasks.method: Bubble plot with performance-impact vs awards ratio. Size encodes total matches. Anomaly detection via DBSCAN to highlight over/under-valued players.
tasks.objective: Identify players with disproportionate impact compared to formal recognition
